sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
all_nodes = seg['nodes']
colors = {}
for n in all_nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c not in colors:
        colors[c] = []
    center = (sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']), sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']))
    colors[c].append((center, n['hash'], n['pixels']))
for c, items in sorted(colors.items()):
    print(f"  {c}: {len(items)} nodes")
    for item in items:
        print(f"    at {item[0]}, hash={item[1]}, pixels={item[2]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving RIGHT

for n in N_nodes:
    center = (sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']), sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']))
    print(f"  N at {center}")
for n in Y_nodes:
    center = (sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']), sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']))
    print(f"  Y at {center}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")

</function>

# Try moving RIGHT
result = action([{'action': 'RIGHT'}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
Y_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"After RIGHT: N={len(N_nodes)}")
for n in N_nodes:
    center = (sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']), sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']))
    print(f"  N at {center}")
for n in Y_nodes:
    center = (sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']), sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']))
    print(f"  Y at {center}")
